banned_patterns: STOP documenting gate-verification rules in prose without embedding them as executable constraints that actually block execution at STEP 0 AND adding enforcement_test_result field to output format. STOP allowing improvements array to be non-empty when gate_status_verified=false. STOP omitting the enforcement_test_result field from JSON output. The blocker only works if it actually blocks execution AND the test result is visible in every response.
